full_text:
**Responsible: Ziqi Kang**, Elias Ruuska, Aleksandra Shabanova

**Timeline:** 2025.03 - now

**Description:** A framework for quantitative spatial analysis of the
tumor microenvironment, especially for large whole slide images. This
project starts as a side project of
[[12_SPACE]{.underline}](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1PD68Rq4op906-SWc-ulKW6RHN-3k0-Hd)
In March 2025, Ziqi was working on it for 4 months and invited Elias &
Aleksandra to join. SPACEstat was then also used for the analysis of
[[9_EyeMT]{.underline}](https://drive.google.com/open?id=18c_o5KgrF6yFvJJywDQ2ryGi14gsC9MC).
